behaviors.description: The evaluate-stage command stores grounding into a dedicated `grounding` artifact, not the `plan` artifact.
behaviors.justification: This is a cross-module artifact-routing check (evaluate command + artifact store contract). Unit tests on mapping logic can miss real handoff mistakes (wrong slot name, serializer path). Rejected System because behavior text is only about artifact slot selection, not real OS/network/subprocess or external round-trip. Rejected Agentic because correctness is about where data is stored, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Run evaluate-stage command with a real in-process artifact repository and verify `grounding` is created/updated while `plan` is untouched by this write path.

behaviors.description: The implement-stage flow reads grounding when available and still writes its execution output to `plan`.
behaviors.justification: This validates wiring across implement flow, artifact read path, and artifact write path. Unit-only checks of helper functions can miss state handoff defects. Rejected System because no real external infra is required by the behavior text. Rejected Agentic because the assertion is about artifact I/O semantics, not whether model-generated content is good/correct.
behaviors.test_description: Seed run context with a `grounding` artifact, execute implement flow with deterministic stubs, then assert grounding was read (used input path) and output persisted to `plan` only.

behaviors.description: Deep-dive no longer overwrites `plan` as a redundant side effect when diagnosis already exists in issue content.
behaviors.justification: The failure mode is an interaction bug: deep-dive stage decision + artifact writer side effect. Unit tests for the conditional alone can miss unintended write calls in orchestration code. Rejected System because no real subprocess/network/OS dependency is described. Rejected Agentic because this behavior is about suppressing a write side effect, not evaluating model judgment quality.
behaviors.test_description: Execute deep-dive stage in a context where issue content already contains diagnosis; assert no write/update call occurs for `plan` while other expected outputs remain intact.

behaviors.description: Artifact lineage is preserved so implement can read the `grounding` artifact produced earlier in the same run context.
behaviors.justification: Lineage preservation is a state-handoff concern across components (run context, artifact indexing, implement reader). Unit tests on individual classes can miss key/namespace/version mismatches. Rejected System because behavior text scopes to same run context, not external boundary verification. Rejected Workflow because it does not require validating multiple real model decisions; it requires continuity of stored artifact references.
behaviors.test_description: Create a single run context, persist grounding in an earlier stage, then invoke implement-stage reader and assert it resolves the exact earlier grounding artifact via lineage metadata.

behaviors.description: In a full multi-step agent run (`deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`), the final implementation plan reflects grounding produced earlier in the run.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires a full multi-step agent chain and end-to-end propagation of grounding into final plan output across stages. This is beyond single-step agentic checks because multiple model-driven stages are sequenced. Rejected lower levels because they cannot expose cross-step agent pipeline failures in real sequencing/handoff.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real chain end-to-end in one run context and assert the final implementation plan demonstrably incorporates grounding facts emitted earlier (traceable references/constraints carried through stage transitions).

behaviors.description: When grounding is absent, implement falls back safely and still emits a valid plan artifact without corrupting other stored artifacts.
behaviors.justification: This is fallback behavior across artifact lookup + implement writer + repository state integrity. Unit-only tests may miss corruption/regression in shared storage interactions. Rejected System because no external infra boundary is required by behavior text. Rejected Agentic because success criteria are structural safety and artifact integrity, not model output quality.
behaviors.test_description: Start with run context lacking `grounding` but containing unrelated artifacts, run implement flow, then assert a valid `plan` artifact is emitted and pre-existing artifacts are unchanged.
